highlights.text:
what i do:
Who are you, and what do you make?
•
•
i aim to move people,
i consider my work as object poetry.
How do you work? What is the core of your practice?
•
•
i make many things, mostly machines
more accurately, gluttonous expressions
How would you describe your work to someone unfamiliar with your field?
its not finished
•
What medium, method, or materials define your approach?
•
•
i dont define myself for using certain material
i do enjoy 3d printing because it grants more freedom
What ideas, themes, or questions does your work engage with?
sublime, surreal, system, childlike, whatever interests me
•
Where does the work come from? Why do you make it?
•
i enjoy it, i make it with my brain and hands, but i have to eat to keep it
operational so it comes from the ground or instant ramen.
What traditions, disciplines, or histories is your work in dialogue with?
my childhood, surrealism, my surroundings, music
•
